Metadata.title: MOTO — own the city, rule the road
Metadata.description: MOTO is a free-roam arcade game with 8 bikes, 21 cars, an island city, traffic, events, garages and custom physics. Play in your browser on desktop and mobile.
Metadata.ogAlt: A motorcycle pulls a wheelie in MOTO's island city

Hero.description: Wheelie past the skyline, carve the coast, collect bikes and cars. MOTO is an open-world arcade game built for the browser.
Hero.videoLabel: Gameplay montage: wheelie, city driving and the Villa showroom
Hero.posterAlt: A sport bike pulling a wheelie on a city road

Features.title: Not a promise. A world already running.
Features.intro: Every system below is already in the game, working together without menus breaking the flow.

physics.title: Custom arcade physics
physics.body: Wheelies, stoppies, drifts, burnouts, jumps and crashes: instantly readable, deep when you push it.

vehicles.title: 8 bikes + 21 cars
vehicles.body: From scooter to superbike, city car to Formula: distinct mass, grip and personality.

world.title: Free-roam island city
world.body: Downtown, coast, village, ring road, bridges and a race track with no mandatory route.

activities.title: Street activities
activities.body: Traffic, races, deliveries, speed traps and events surface directly in the world.

economy.title: Economy and upgrades
economy.body: Earn credits, buy at the dealership and tune engine, brakes, tires and setup at the workshop.

villa.title: 20-slot showroom
villa.body: Unlock three homes. The Villa turns your collection into a garage you can walk through.

walking.title: Get out and walk
walking.body: Leave your vehicle, explore on foot and choose your next ride inside the garage.

audio.title: Engines with a voice
audio.body: Audio responds to revs, load and speed so every pull has the right weight.

platforms.title: Desktop and mobile
platforms.body: Keyboard, gamepad and touch. Installable as a PWA and available offline.

cloud.title: Accounts and cloud saves
cloud.body: Save progress, garages, properties and upgrades and pick up on another device.

World.title: Follow the road. Or don't.
World.body: A city that keeps moving around you: traffic lights and NPC traffic, sea views, ramps, workshop, dealership and a track whenever you want to chase the clock.
World.activityBody: Take a delivery, chase a speed-trap record, hit the track or wander without a goal. The game never takes away your keys.

Garage.title: Twenty slots. Twenty-nine temptations.
Garage.body: Buy, test, paint and upgrade 8 bikes and 21 cars. At the Villa you can walk between two rows, fill all 20 slots and choose what goes out next.
Garage.imageAlt: The Villa showroom filled with bikes and cars in two rows
Garage.caption: A real showroom, not a list.

wheelie.title: Wheelie
wheelie.alt: A sport bike pulling a wheelie on a city road

city.title: City and traffic
city.alt: Driving through the island city downtown with traffic

race.title: Race island
race.alt: A vehicle racing on the island track

workshop.title: Workshop
workshop.alt: Workshop interface used to upgrade a vehicle

villa.title: The Villa
villa.alt: The Villa showroom filled with twenty vehicles

Roadmap.title: A roadmap without made-up speedometers.
Roadmap.intro: Three clear states: what you can drive now, what we are building and where we want to go next.

now.title: Playable now
now.description: Systems available in the public build.

development.title: In development
development.description: Active work and the next objectives.

items.freeroam: Island city, traffic and race track
items.platforms: Desktop, mobile, PWA, accounts and cloud saves
items.biomes: New biomes and points of interest

Final.title: The next run is yours.
Final.body: Open your browser, choose a ride and go. No mandatory download.
Final.transition: Installed the PWA from moto.lucz.dev before? The game now lives at a new address and may need to be installed again.

Footer.tagline: Hand-built free-roam arcade for the browser.
Footer.copyright: © {year} MOTO / lucz. All gameplay shown was captured in-game.
